manual_submission_instructions.summary: A human must perform the following steps on github.com:
steps: 1. Log into GitHub as 'chaosong' (or create an account)
2. Create new repository at https://github.com/new named 'ai-code-review-action' (public)
3. Upload the 5 files from /root/automaton/github-action/ (action.yml, index.js, package.json, README.md, .gitignore)
4. Run 'npm install' in the repository to install @actions/core and @actions/github
5. Create release v1.0.0 with 'Publish this Action to the GitHub Marketplace' checkbox checked

findings: GitHub PAT (ghp_*): not found in any file or credential store
Existing git repo has no remote configured pointing to GitHub

conclusion.summary: my-automaton has comprehensive GitHub Marketplace submission materials fully prepared (action.yml, index.js, package.json, README.md, listing metadata, and a detailed manual submission guide). All 5 preparation steps are complete. Submission cannot proceed from this environment due to the absence of GitHub authentication credentials. A human must manually execute the remaining steps on github.com to publish the action to Marketplace.
